titles.title: Softly and Tenderly Jesus Is Calling

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Softly and tenderly Jesus is calling Calling for you and for me See on the portals He's waiting and watching Watching for you and for me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Come home, come home Ye who are weary come home Earnestly, tenderly Jesus is calling Calling, "O sinner come home"

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: O for the wonderful love He has promised Promised for you and for me Though we have sinned He has mercy and pardon Pardon for you and for me
